parameters.jsCode:
// Static operator guidance for help/format questions
const parsed = $input.first().json;

const guide = 'AutoShop Dev-Loop Bot\n\n' +
  'Send a task as a plain text message. It will be analyzed and executed by Claude.\n\n' +
  'Task format examples:\n' +
  '  "Add a formatPhoneNumber utility in packages/shared/src/"\n' +
  '  "Fix the calendar sync retry logic for 401 errors"\n' +
  '  "List all TypeScript files in apps/api/src/routes/"\n\n' +
  'What happens:\n' +
  '  1. Instant ack (1-2s)\n' +
  '  2. Claude analyzes and executes (30-60s)\n' +
  '  3. Result with status, decision, and branch\n\n' +
  'Operator commands:\n' +
  '  "next task" — show next available task\n' +
  '  "status" — task queue summary\n' +
  '  "list tasks" — recent tasks\n' +
  '  "pending" — pending tasks\n' +
  '  "failed" — failed tasks\n\n' +
  'All other messages go to Claude for execution.';

return [{ json: {
  chatId: parsed.chatId,
  replyText: guide
} }];
